title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 324.220 - Authority of division
text:
324.220.  Authority of division. — The division shall:
  (1)  Employ, within the funds appropriated, such employees as are necessary to carry out the provisions of sections 324.200 to 324.225; and
  (2)  Exercise all budgeting, purchasing, reporting and other related management functions.
(L. 1998 H.B. 1601, et al. merged with S.B. 650, A.L. 1999 H.B. 343)
